result.summary: Together AI exposes a documented HTTP API at `https://api.together.ai/v1`, a Python-installed `tg`/`together` CLI, and a docs MCP server mentioned in agent docs; the HTTP API and CLI use Together project API keys.
result.description: Together AI is a cloud platform for running, fine-tuning, and deploying AI models, including serverless inference, dedicated endpoints, GPU clusters, and code execution tools. It provides access to open-source and frontier models through its own infrastructure and management tools.

together_api_key.label: Together AI project API key
together_api_key.setup: In the Together web app, open your project’s [API keys settings](https://api.together.ai/settings/projects/~current/api-keys), choose **Create API Key**, name it, optionally set an expiration, and copy the key immediately. Together’s auth guide is [Authentication](https://docs.together.ai/docs/api-keys-authentication). For SDKs and CLI, set it as `TOGETHER_API_KEY`.

surfaces.name: Together AI API
surfaces.notes: Covers Together’s documented REST endpoints under `https://api.together.ai/v1`, including chat/completions, completions, images, audio, embeddings, rerank, models, files, batches, fine-tuning, evaluations, endpoints, clusters, and dedicated container queue APIs referenced from the docs index and llms.txt.
